title: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Opus 4.6](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-opus-4-6) as a Databricks-hosted model.

To access this model, use:

* [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis)
  + [Query reasoning models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-reason-models)
  + [Query vision models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-vision-models)
